description_long: This object is a highly detailed flintlock-style shotgun with a dark, ornately engraved barrel and a robust, metallic receiver. The grip is wrapped in textured brown leather or cord, providing a secure hold and a rustic aesthetic. The trigger mechanism and hammer are prominently visible, with metallic components that suggest historical craftsmanship. The barrel is relatively short and flared, featuring intricate floral or scrollwork engravings along its length. The overall construction combines metal and wood, with the wood elements appearing aged and polished. The shotgun exudes an antique, decorative quality, reminiscent of weaponry from the 18th or 19th century.
description: An ornately engraved, antique flintlock shotgun with a short, flared barrel and a leather-wrapped wooden grip. The metalwork is detailed and the overall design is robust and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular, flared muzzle and the symmetrical alignment of the barrel and grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the engraved barrel, exposed hammer, trigger, and the wrapped grip.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the end of the grip and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the ornate barrel engravings, hammer, and trigger mechanism, mirroring view 1.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and flared with ornate engravings and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth, continuous curve and no finger grooves or reinforcement
